## Breaking Change Checklist

_Skip if no breaking changes._

- [ ] Wire-protocol compatibility impact documented in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Migration path described in PR description or linked doc
- [ ] Affected modules listed in the PR summary

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): summary`).
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behaviour changes.
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` when appropriate.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes called out for maintainer review (auth, TLS, wire protocol, serialization, CVE deps).
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or secrets introduced.
